name: opportunities.sources.recipe-backfill
description: Every 15 min — enqueues AI recipe generation (recipe.generate.v1) for active/degraded sources of a recipe-eligible type that lack a recipe and are not flagged for tuning. No-op while recipe generation is disabled (RECIPE_ENABLED=false), so the cron is always safe to fire. Idempotent: sources that already have a recipe are skipped. The endpoint only enumerates and enqueues — generation runs on the recipe.generate.v1 consumers, so throughput scales by adding crawler replicas.

steps.name: Enqueue recipe generation for recipe-less sources
